questions.question: What is the primary function of the System Control Unit (SCU) in a synchronization hardware?
questions.hint: It controls the transfer of data between the CPU and other components

questions.question: Describe the role of the Translation Lookaside Buffer (TLB) in synchronization hardware. (6 marks)
questions.hint: It translates virtual page numbers to physical addresses

questions.question: Explain the difference between a bus and a channel in the context of synchronization hardware. (7 marks)
questions.hint: A bus is a shared communication pathway between multiple devices, while a channel is a dedicated, point-to-point connection between two devices
